name: humanspec_NOTCH2NLA_orangutan
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: NOTCH2NLA. Status in Pongo abelii: 'human_specific_present_only_in_Homo'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr1:~146.3 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr1. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for NOTCH2NLA. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. NOTCH2NLA)
